race.description: Dalby & Northern Downs Jockey Club Life Members Hcp (55)
race.comment: ARTIFACTX (3) finished just out of the money two starts back then wasn't disgraced beaten 3.5 lengths when fourth in a 1540m contest at Gold Coast Poly a month ago. Will enjoy a drop in class so he can find the winners' list. UCELLE (10) has placed over this track and trip and is usually thereabouts. Definite top-three prospects with any luck in running. TRUCK STOP HONEY (9) was ridden quietly then picked up fairly well in the straight and finished sixth last time out over 1050m at Toowoomba when resuming from a spell. Should park just off the speed despite the draw and is likely to play a role in the outcome. WHAT DID YOU SAY (2) best of the rest from the favourable alley.
